tool.name: ssti_tester
tool.description: Test for SSTI (Server-Side Template Injection) vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect template engine (Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, etc.) - Test basic SSTI injection - Generate RCE payloads for specific engines - Test endpoints with SSTI payloads

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - detect_engine: Detect template engine - test_basic: Test basic SSTI - generate_payload: Generate RCE payload for engine - test_endpoint: Test endpoint with SSTI payload

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for testing. Required for detect_engine, test_basic, test_endpoint.

parameter.name: engine
parameter.description: Template engine: jinja2, twig, freemarker, velocity, erb, smarty, thymeleaf

parameter.name: command
parameter.description: Command to execute in RCE payload (default: id)

tool.examples:
# Detect template engine
detect_engine https://example.com/render template
# Generate payload for Jinja2
generate_payload jinja2 whoami
# Test endpoint
test_endpoint https://example.com/render jinja2
